biomes.arctic: summer sea ice shrinking, ice-free summers projected within a decade

notable_events: Record-breaking heatwaves across South Asia and Southern Europe in 2025
Groundwater depletion acute in the US High Plains and northern India

economy.gdp_trends: Modest global growth; inflation cooling from 2022-2024 peaks; AI capex boom concentrated in US/China
economy.tech_level: Frontier AI widely deployed in white-collar work; humanoid robotics in early pilot; fusion still pre-commercial; EV share of new car sales ~25% globally
economy.labor: White-collar displacement anxiety rising; creative and administrative roles contracting; skilled trades and care work tight
economy.trade: US-China decoupling in semiconductors and AI chips; friend-shoring to Mexico, Vietnam, India accelerating
economy.energy_mix: Renewables ~40% of new generation; coal slowly declining; natural gas sticky; nuclear revival in planning stages

geopolitics.military_posture: NATO rearming; China expanding navy; drone warfare now standard; AI targeting systems in field trials

society.population: World ~8.1 billion; fertility below replacement in most of East Asia, Europe, and parts of Latin America
society.health: Post-COVID excess mortality receding; GLP-1 weight-loss drugs reshaping metabolic health in rich countries; antibiotic resistance worsening
society.migration: Climate and conflict migration pressures at US southern border, Mediterranean, and within South/Southeast Asia
society.political_climate: Populist backlash to immigration and elite institutions in many democracies; declining trust in media; generational divides over housing and AI

culture.media: TikTok-shaped short video dominates under-30 attention; legacy news consolidating; AI-generated content flooding feeds
culture.values_shift: Younger cohorts more pessimistic about institutions and the future; renewed interest in localism and trades
subcultures: AI-skeptic analog scenes (film cameras, typewriters, acoustic)

narrative_threads.name: The quiet unmaking of white-collar work
narrative_threads.arc_so_far: Throughout 2024-2026, firms began silently replacing junior analysts, paralegals, and copywriters with AI assistants. No mass layoffs announced; hiring simply stopped. A generation of new graduates faces a vanishing first rung.

narrative_threads.name: The slow emptying of the tropics
narrative_threads.arc_so_far: Heat, water stress, and crop failure are making parts of the Sahel, Central America, and South Asia marginal. Migration northward and to cities accelerates but remains individually invisible — a family here, a village there.
